political_timeline.notes: Joined during India Against Corruption movement in 2011–12. Became youngest Rajya Sabha MP ever at age 33. Removed as RS deputy leader on April 2, 2026 — weeks before defection.
Defected with 6 other AAP Rajya Sabha MPs using constitutional merger provision (was 7 of 10 AAP RS MPs — crossed 2/3 threshold). Deleted all anti-BJP posts from X before announcing switch.

before_switch.quote: We in India today pay taxes like England to get services like Somalia.
before_switch.source_title: Raghav Chadha Full Speech in Rajya Sabha on Union Budget 2024
before_switch.context: Rajya Sabha speech during Union Budget 2024–25 discussion.

before_switch.quote: There is a tax on waking up, there is a tax on sleeping and crying… there is a tax on books and ink, on vegetables, cars, houses, and on buying and selling.
before_switch.source_title: Best Of Raghav Chadha's Speech In Parliament On Budget 2024
before_switch.context: Same Rajya Sabha Budget speech — mocking the breadth of GST and indirect taxes under the BJP-led government.

before_switch.quote: Mera ye manana hai ki BJP anpadh gundon ki party hai. BJP ke log gundagardi karte hain aur unko badhava dete hain. (I believe BJP is a party of illiterate goons. BJP people indulge in hooliganism and they patronize it.)
before_switch.source_title: Unfiltered By Samdish ft. Raghav Chadha | Member of Parliament, Aam Aadmi Party | Full Video
before_switch.context: Interview with YouTuber Samdish Bhatia (Unfiltered by Samdish), recorded May 15, 2022, published June 2, 2022.

before_switch.quote: The BJP government has weaponised investigative agencies like the ED and CBI against opposition leaders. This is an assault on democracy.
before_switch.source_title: From Critic to Convert: Raghav Chadha Leads Dramatic Rajya Sabha Defection To BJP
before_switch.context: Consistent theme across multiple Rajya Sabha interventions during 2022–24.

after_switch.quote: The Aam Aadmi Party, which I nurtured with my blood and sweat and to which I gave 15 years of my youth, has now completely deviated from its principles, values, and core morals.
after_switch.source_title: Major blow to AAP: Raghav Chadha-led group of 7 MPs joins BJP, cites 'principles'
after_switch.context: Press conference in Delhi on April 24, 2026 announcing BJP merger.

after_switch.quote: For the past few years, I felt like the right man in the wrong party. So today, we announce that I am distancing myself from the AAP and getting close to the public.
after_switch.source_title: Raghav Chadha joins BJP; says he felt like 'right man in wrong party'

after_switch.quote: I am telling you the real reason as to why I distanced myself from party activities. I did not want to be a part of their crimes.
after_switch.source_title: Raghav Chadha, Ashok Mittal and Sandeep Pathak quit AAP in big jolt to Kejriwal, join BJP

institutions.name: Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI)
